name: Amazon platform qualification pack
change_note: Migrated from script PLATFORM_HINTS into a composable platform pack.
checklist_hints: Check official category approval, restricted product, brand/IP, and product compliance policy pages.
For FBA, include packaging, labeling, dangerous goods, and warehouse acceptance constraints.

requirements.requirement: Verify current Amazon policy pages for seller eligibility, restricted products, category approval, and the exact marketplace site.
evidence_expected: category approval screenshot or workflow evidence where available
requirements.decision_effect: Do not approve Amazon cases from memory or applicant screenshots alone when policy eligibility affects the decision.
requirements.notes: Seed platform requirement; attach checked official Amazon URL before a final decision.

requirements.requirement: For FBA or regulated products, verify packaging, labeling, dangerous goods, test report, and product compliance requirements for the marketplace site.
requirements.decision_effect: Missing FBA or product-compliance evidence blocks approval for affected products.
requirements.notes: Use product/category-specific Amazon policy and destination-market regulator sources.

gaps: Seed pack: verify current official Amazon policy pages per case before final decisions.
